role: Credential storage infrastructure for ArchSpine, providing secure platform-specific backends and managed credential stores.
responsibility: Collectively, these two modules offer a unified, secure, and platform-adaptive system for persisting and retrieving secrets like LLM API keys, with deterministic scoping for per-project and global storage.

children.role: Infrastructure facade providing platform-specific credential storage backends for secure secret persistence across macOS, Linux, and Windows, with an in-memory fallback.
Infrastructure module providing pluggable, secure credential storage for LLM API keys, with deterministic factory functions for project-scoped and global stores.
